Container.Name: sphere86
Container.Overview: Sphere86: web UI for 86Box configs and Sunshine publishing with embedded Sunshine + 86Box runtime. Configure separate persistent paths for Sphere86 (/data/sphere86), Sunshine (/data/sunshine), and 86Box (/data/86box). Set SPHERE86_SECRET to a stable random value of at least 32 characters. Default image tag is latest; to use beta/other tags, edit the Repository value (e.g. :beta or :v1.1.0-beta).

Config.Name: Sphere86 Web UI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for Sphere86 web UI

Config.Name: Sunshine API/Web UI Port
Config.Description: Sunshine API + HTTPS Web UI port

Config.Name: Sunshine Stream Port (TCP)
Config.Description: Sunshine stream/session TCP port

Config.Name: Sunshine Discovery Port (TCP/UDP)
Config.Description: Sunshine discovery TCP port

Config.Name: Sunshine Discovery Port (UDP)
Config.Description: Sunshine discovery UDP port

Config.Name: Sunshine Stream Port (UDP)
Config.Description: Sunshine stream/session UDP port

Config.Name: Sunshine Control Port
Config.Description: Sunshine control TCP port

Config.Name: uinput Device
Config.Description: Virtual input device for Sunshine mouse/keyboard passthrough

Config.Name: uhid Device
Config.Description: Virtual HID device used by Sunshine controllers/input backends

Config.Name: ALSA Device
Config.Description: Optional host audio device passthrough for container audio

Config.Name: Sphere86 Data
Config.Description: Persistent Sphere86 app data (DB/logs/cache)

Config.Name: Sunshine Data
Config.Description: Persistent Sunshine config and credentials

Config.Name: 86Box Data
Config.Description: Persistent 86Box VMs and ROM store

Config.Name: SPHERE86_SECRET
Config.Description: Credential encryption key (min 32 characters). Keep the same value across upgrades.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: SQLite file for Sphere86

Config.Name: SPHERE86_DATA_ROOT
Config.Description: Sphere86 app data root

Config.Name: BOX86_CONFIG_BASE_PATH
Config.Description: 86Box config base path used by publish/deploy

Config.Name: BOX86_ROMS_PATH
Config.Description: ROM path passed to 86Box (-R). Kept persistent via /data/86box/roms symlink.

Config.Name: SPHERE86_EMBEDDED_CONFIG_BASE_PATH
Config.Description: Embedded 86Box path for generated VM configs

Config.Name: SPHERE86_EMBEDDED_HOST_PORT
Config.Description: Embedded Sunshine API/WebUI port used by Sphere86

Config.Name: SUNSHINE_STREAM_PORT
Config.Description: Sunshine stream/discovery base port written into sunshine.conf

Config.Name: SPHERE86_EMBEDDED_HOST_PUBLIC_ADDRESS
Config.Description: Optional public IP/hostname shown in embedded Sunshine links (leave empty to use request host).

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Node environment

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal HTTP port (match Web UI port)

Config.Name: HOST
Config.Description: Bind address inside container
